hero.title: Choose the recording plan that matches your team's meeting rhythm.
hero.description: Kapter measures quota by completed recording minutes each month. When quota runs out, the Extension blocks new sessions before opening the recorder.

quota.title: This month's quota
quota.signedOut: Sign in to view remaining quota and your current plan status.

FREE.name: Free
FREE.description: For testing the recording and internal review flow.

PRO.name: Pro
PRO.description: For regular recordings and post-meeting task review.
features: Expanded quota for busier meeting schedules

TEAM.name: Team
TEAM.description: For small teams standardizing meeting knowledge and handoffs.

quotaProtection.title: Kapter checks quota before recording
quotaProtection.description: Before each recording starts, Kapter checks your remaining minutes so you do not accidentally start a new session after your plan runs out.

errors.sessionToken: Your sign-in session is not ready. Please sign in again and retry.
errors.loadStatus: Unable to load the subscription status.
errors.network: Could not connect to the plan service. Please check your connection or try again later.
